Replace.Text: Determines how long Players have to take their Turn. [n]None - Players take Turns without time constraints.[n]Standard - Turn time is based on the Turn Time option (in seconds). [n]Dynamic - Turn time is dynamically scaled based on the number of Cities and Units in play. [n]Competitive - Turn time scales with Cities, Units, human Players and the current Turn, tuned per Age. Warning tones begin at 30 seconds; the Turn ends automatically at zero.

Row.Text: Turn time scales with the Cities and Units in play, the number of human Players, and the current Turn, tuned per Age.
